input: Could you optimize our emergency routing using these station addresses: 3500 Fire Lane Dr, Springfield, IL and 800 Rescue Rd, Shelbyville, KY? Also, please remove member mem_7742 from the EMRG-COMMS-04 group and reset their device to clear the queue since they're inactive.
